zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Maston Moreton於1425年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特時，他的父親Ralphe de Moreton35歲，母親Johanna de Vernon25歲。他於大約1441年與Margaret Woodnoth在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1454年在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Maston Moreton于1425年出生在英国英格兰爾切斯特时，他的父亲Ralphe de Moreton35岁，母亲Johanna de Vernon25岁。他于大约1441年与Margaret Woodnoth在英国爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1454年在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moreton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: Maston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; a traditional name in aristocratic families of Languedoc, so perhaps an altered form of Gascon, denoting someone from Gascony in Languedoc.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Maston Moreton was born in 1425, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralphe de Moreton, was 35 and his mother, Johanna de Vernon, was 25. He married Margaret Woodnoth about 1441, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1454, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Maston Moreton est né en 1425, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralphe de Moreton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Johanna de Vernon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Woodnoth environ 1441, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1454, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Maston Moreton(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralphe de Moreton(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna de Vernon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1441년 영국 체실르에서 Margaret Woodnoth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1454년 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Maston Moreton родился в 1425 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralphe de Moreton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna de Vernon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Woodnoth около 1441 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1454 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.
